gui.eosp2p.pretty_os_hint:
Minecraft is now running on %s operating system. 
However, EOSP2P can only operate in Windows, Linux or MacOS with a version >= 10.15 (Catalina)
gui.eosp2p.pretty_os_arch:
Minecraft is now running on a cpu with architecture %s. 
However, EOSP2P can only operate with x86-64(amd64) and arm64(aarch64) only
gui.eosp2p.library_not_found:
Library bundled with this mod not found or corrupted. 
Please consider to re-download EOSP2P
gui.eosp2p.init_failed:
The initialization of Epic Online Service has failed. 
EOSP2P cannot function on this instance
gui.eosp2p.puid_fail:
Failed to obtain product UID. 
EOSP2P cannot function on this instance.
gui.eosp2p.puid_fail_mac:
%s

Note: There are known issues in obtaining Product UID with MacOS.
Please open 'Keychain Access', navigate to the Login keychain, select item with name 'com.epicgames.sdk.connect.access_token' (if multiple instance occur, choose the most recent one), navigate to the Access Control tab and select 'Allow all applications to access this item' as a temporary work-around fix.
